name: opsscreen
description: Training-only humanitarian intake PWA with Vercel Functions and managed Postgres storage.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check api/auth.js && node --check api/platform.js && node --check api/audit-log.js && node --check api/records/index.js && node --check 'api/records/[recordId].js' && node --check lib/auth.js && node --check lib/db.js
